productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Black Dial Analog Chronograph Watch
description: Style Note You would want to do anything but move on from this watch from fastrack. This chunky, stylish watch will style your casual look and add something extra to your entire getup. Product Details Case style: Digital and analog watch with a steel round case Dial style: Black dial with small circular digital displays and red and white hands Strap style: Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Press to reset time, date, chronograph, timer, day of the week, alarm, illumination, hourly chime and a second time zone screw to reset time Water resistant up to 50 meters protecting it even when swimming and showering Warranty: 2 years Material and Care Stainless steel Wipe with a clean and dry cloth when needed Size Case diameter: 36 mm Case thickness: 11 mm
